Abductor Virgins.name: Abductor Virgins
Abductor Virgins.description: Deadly mechanical constructs who wield massive blades.
Abductor Virgins.description_cn: 致命的机械构造体，挥舞着巨大的刀片。

Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader.name: Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader
Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader.location: Ringleader's Evergoal, Liurnia of the Lakes
Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader.description: Remarkably agile and aggressive warrior. Dangerous even for those with shield coverage...
Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader.description_cn: 异常敏捷且凶猛的战士。即使持有盾牌也极为危险……

Alabaster Lord.name: Alabaster Lord
Alabaster Lord.location: Royal Grave Evergaol, Liurnia of the Lakes
Alabaster Lord.description: An Evergaol prisoner wielding a vicious sword and the void with murderous intent.
Alabaster Lord.description_cn: 白王，操控重力术的星之遗民，使用重力刀。

Adan, Thief Of Fire.name: Adan, Thief Of Fire
Adan, Thief Of Fire.description: An evergaol prisoner and former battle mage, Adan wields a spiked flail and uses stolen knowledge of fire magic to great effect.
Adan, Thief Of Fire.description_cn: 盗火亚坦，偷走火焰的恶徒，使用火焰祷告战斗。

Ancient Dragon Lansseax.name: Ancient Dragon Lansseax
Ancient Dragon Lansseax.description: Lansseax was the sister of Fortissax. It is said that she took the from of a human to commune with the knights as a priestess of the ancient dragon cult.
Ancient Dragon Lansseax.description_cn: 古龙兰斯桑克斯，能够化为人形，掌握着古龙的雷电之力。

Ancestor Spirit.name: Ancestor Spirit
Ancestor Spirit.description: A glowing spirit that takes the form of a large deer, making it a menacing threat when charging at targets.
Ancestor Spirit.description_cn: 以巨大雄鹿形态出现的灵体，冲锋时极具威胁。

Ancient Hero Of Zamor.name: Ancient Hero Of Zamor
Ancient Hero Of Zamor.description: Noticeably agile, frost-made creature suceptible to magic attacks.
Ancient Hero Of Zamor.description_cn: 萨米尔古英雄，身披冰霜的古老战士，操控暴风雪。
Ancient Hero Of Zamor.location_cn: 啜泣封印监牢、击败巨人的英雄墓地

Beast Clergyman.name: Beast Clergyman
Beast Clergyman.description: Temporarily overtaken by their bestial rage, the Beast Clergyman attacks ferociously, throwing rocks and themselves at their foes. Calm their aggression and return them to their senses.
Beast Clergyman.description_cn: 野兽神职人员，守护着死者的死亡之痕。
Beast Clergyman.location_cn: 逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉

Astel, Stars Of Darkness.name: Astel, Stars Of Darkness
Astel, Stars Of Darkness.location: Yelough Anix Tunnel in Consecrated Snowfield
Astel, Stars Of Darkness.description: A hostile, massive Dragon-Fly creature. Menacing and extremely powerful.
Astel, Stars Of Darkness.description_cn: 黑暗弃星艾丝缇，与自然诞生的艾丝缇相似的另一只星之异形。
Astel, Stars Of Darkness.location_cn: 耶洛克尼斯坑道（化圣雪原）

Beast Of Farum Azula.name: Beast Of Farum Azula
Beast Of Farum Azula.description: Underground-living creature found at Groveside Cave
Beast Of Farum Azula.description_cn: 法姆·亚兹拉的野兽，受野兽祭祀驱使的兽类灵体。

Beastman Of Farum Azula.name: Beastman Of Farum Azula
Beastman Of Farum Azula.description: The beasts of Groveside Cave rally around the prowess of the Beastman of Farum Azula
Beastman Of Farum Azula.description_cn: 法姆·亚兹拉的兽人，手持武器的远古兽人。

Bell Bearing Hunter.name: Bell Bearing Hunter
Bell Bearing Hunter.location: Warmaster's Shack, Northern Stormhill, Church of Vows, East Liurnia, Hermit Merchant's Shack, Leyndell Royal Captial, Dragonbarrow, North Caelid
Bell Bearing Hunter.description: Menacing and slow-paced, it wields a large, red-glowing sword and a shield combined with a full body armor and a chilling cape.
Bell Bearing Hunter.description_cn: 手持猩红发光巨剑与盾牌的骇人战士，动作缓慢而充满压迫感。
Bell Bearing Hunter.location_cn: 战帅破屋、结缘教堂等多地点

Black Blade Kindred.name: Black Blade Kindred
Black Blade Kindred.description: Imposing Gargoyle wielding a massive armament
Black Blade Kindred.description_cn: 黑剑眷属，镇守神授塔入口的巨型石像守卫。

Black Knife Assassin.name: Black Knife Assassin
Black Knife Assassin.location: Deathtouched Catacombs, Black Knife CatacombsSage's Cave
Black Knife Assassin.description: Relentless and agile dark figures carrying a
Black Knife Assassin.description_cn: 黑刀刺客，使用消逝之力的秘密刺客，动作迅捷。
Black Knife Assassin.location_cn: 死亡触碰地下墓地、黑刀地下墓地、贤者洞窟

Bloodhound Knight Darriwil.name: Bloodhound Knight Darriwil
Bloodhound Knight Darriwil.description: The merciless bloodhounds attack with grace and agility, never backing down or giving a moment's rest.
Bloodhound Knight Darriwil.description_cn: 猎犬骑士达瑞威尔，背叛主人的迅捷剑士。
Bloodhound Knight Darriwil.location_cn: 宁姆格福·猎犬封印监牢

Burial Tree Watchdog.name: Burial Tree Watchdog
Burial Tree Watchdog.description: A large feline-hound looking guardian that serves as a "Watchdog"for the Burial Tree of the Stormfoot Catacombs.
Burial Tree Watchdog.description_cn: 黄金树看门犬，守护地下墓地的石像犬首领。
Burial Tree Watchdog.location_cn: 宁姆格福·风暴脚跟地下墓地

Cleanrot Knight.name: Cleanrot Knight
Cleanrot Knight.location: Stillwater Cave, Liurnia of the Lakes
Cleanrot Knight.description: Powerful, dexterous Knight capable of distanced, very rapid attacks. Its spear and sword are a threat to any light-armored fighter.
Cleanrot Knight.description_cn: 纯净金骑士，侍奉米凯拉的圣树骑士，即便身体腐败仍在战斗。

Borealis The Freezing Fog.name: Borealis The Freezing Fog
Borealis The Freezing Fog.description: Frost Dragon guarding the frozen lake of Mountaintop of Giants, emits a permanent blizzard.
Borealis The Freezing Fog.description_cn: 冰雾猛龙波瑞亚利斯，能喷吐极寒冰雾。

Commander Niall.name: Commander Niall
Commander Niall.description: Commander Niall is a tall and built knight with a peg leg, clad in heavy armor, wielding a halberd that doubles as a battle standard. He is accompanied by two Spectral Banished Knights, one equipped with dual swords and the other equipped with a sword and shield.
Commander Niall.description_cn: 指挥官尼尔，镇守索尔城的残身将军，能召唤两名骑士夹击。

Commander O'neil.name: Commander O'neil
Commander O'neil.description: A large and imposing human commander who wields a halberd that doubles as a battle standard, rousing his spirit minions to battle with unquenchable fervor.
Commander O'neil.description_cn: 指挥官奥尼尔，艾奥尼亚沼泽中徘徊的将军，可召唤随从。

Crucible Knight Ordovis.name: Crucible Knight Ordovis
Crucible Knight Ordovis.description: Large, heavy and fully armored. With the ability to materialize fiery wings and attack from above. Attacks with the huge power of Ordivis's Greatsword and a Greatshield. Slow, but extremely tough and highly dangerous.
Crucible Knight Ordovis.description_cn: 熔炉骑士奥陶琵斯，双人组合的领袖，使用大剑与长矛。

Crystalians.name: Crystalians
Crystalians.description: Crystal energy in the form of a human with devastating power.
Crystalians.description_cn: 结晶人，由纯粹结晶构成的生命体，坚硬外壳难以击破。
Crystalians.location_cn: 学院结晶洞窟、亚坛坑道

Deathbird.name: Deathbird
Deathbird.location: Limgrave, Weeping Peninsula, Liurnia of the Lakes
Deathbird.description: A bipedal bird with arms and a bird skull for a head and is found in various locations
Deathbird.description_cn: 死之鸟，夜空中降临的不祥之鸟，以死亡之火焚烧敌人。
Deathbird.location_cn: 宁姆格福、啜泣半岛、利耶尼亚

Decaying Ekzykes.name: Decaying Ekzykes
Decaying Ekzykes.description: A pale white dragon — its scales blighted by the same scarlet rot that plagues the region of Caelid. It silently waits along the southern highway, awaiting unsuspecting travelers to fall prey to its deathly onslaught.
Decaying Ekzykes.description_cn: 腐败化身艾格基斯，因猩红腐败而严重腐蚀的恶龙。

Demi-human Chief.name: Demi-human Chief
Demi-human Chief.description: The darkness of Coastal Cave hides a den of those who may look almost human, but are certainly not.
Demi-human Chief.description_cn: 亚人首领，统率亚人群体的强壮头目。

Demi-human Queen Maggie.name: Demi-human Queen Maggie
Demi-human Queen Maggie.description: Sovereign Demi-Human creature roaming the lands of Mt. Gelmir
Demi-human Queen Maggie.description_cn: 亚人女王玛姬，体型庞大的亚人女王。

Divine Bridge Golem.name: Divine Bridge Golem
Divine Bridge Golem.description: Enormously large and lethargic Golem that slowly storms into battle when it becomes aware of your presence.
Divine Bridge Golem.description_cn: 神授桥上的看守魔像，持有巨大的弓箭。

Demi-human Queen Margot.name: Demi-human Queen Margot
Demi-human Queen Margot.description: Sovereign Demi-Human creature concealed within isolated caves.
Demi-human Queen Margot.description_cn: 亚人女王玛格特，号令亚人的女性君主。

Draconic Tree Sentinel.name: Draconic Tree Sentinel
Draconic Tree Sentinel.description: Massive knight clad in golden armor atop a giant horse.
Draconic Tree Sentinel.description_cn: 龙装树哨兵，身穿龙甲的精英树哨兵。

Dragonkin Soldier.name: Dragonkin Soldier
Dragonkin Soldier.description: A large, hostile humanoid creature awaken from its drowse straight into battle.
Dragonkin Soldier.description_cn: 龙人士兵，远古时代仿照古龙制作的人造士兵。

Cemetery Shade.name: Cemetery Shade
Cemetery Shade.location: Tombsward Catacombs, Black Knife Catacombs,Caelid Catacombs,
Cemetery Shade.description: Amorphous and shadowy being belonging to the catacombs
Cemetery Shade.description_cn: 隐藏在墓地阴影中的幽魂，使用双刀发动快速攻击。
Cemetery Shade.location_cn: 巡礼教堂地下墓地、黑刀地下墓地、盖利德地下墓地

Crucible Knight.name: Crucible Knight
Crucible Knight.location: Stormhill Evergaol,, Stormveil Castle,, Auriza Hero's Grave
Crucible Knight.description: A formidable, dexterous fighter skilled in melee combat.
Crucible Knight.description_cn: 熔炉骑士，侍奉黄金一族的古老骑士，掌握熔炉百相之力。
Crucible Knight.location_cn: 风暴封印监牢、史东薇尔城、亚雷萨英雄墓地

Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella.name: Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella
Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella.name_cn: 诺克史黛拉的龙人士兵
Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella.description: Huge humanoid-like creature located at the underground caves of Uhl Palace Ruins
Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella.description_cn: 诺克史黛拉的龙人士兵，持戟的古老造物。

Dragonlord Placidusax.name: Dragonlord Placidusax
Dragonlord Placidusax.description: A massive in size, two-headed dragon capable of immense acts of annihilation.
Dragonlord Placidusax.description_cn: 龙王普拉顿桑克斯，曾经的艾尔登之王，坐镇时间尽头。
Dragonlord Placidusax.location_cn: 逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉

Elden Beast.name: Elden Beast
Elden Beast.description: It is said that long ago, the Greater Will sent a golden star bearing a beast into the Lands Between, which would later become the Elden Ring.
Elden Beast.description_cn: 艾尔登之兽，黄金律法的具现化形态，艾尔登之王背后的真正力量。

Elemer Of The Briar.name: Elemer Of The Briar
Elemer Of The Briar.description: Wielding the stolen sword from the Marais family, Elemer of the Briar stands at the top of the castle waiting.
Elemer Of The Briar.description_cn: 荆棘艾尔默，手持「玛雷家行刑剑」的凶残剑士。

Esgar, Priest Of Blood.name: Esgar, Priest Of Blood
Esgar, Priest Of Blood.description_cn: 鲜血祭司艾斯加，侍奉鲜血君王的祭司。

Erdtree Avatar.name: Erdtree Avatar
Erdtree Avatar.location: Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula), Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Southwest), Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Northeast), Minor Erdtree (Caelid), Minor Erdtree (Mountaintops East)
Erdtree Avatar.description: A large headless create which resembles a tree stump.
Erdtree Avatar.description_cn: 黄金树化身，守护黄金树的树灵化身。

Fallingstar Beast.name: Fallingstar Beast
Fallingstar Beast.location: Sellia Crystal Tunnel, Caelid, Altus Plateau
Fallingstar Beast.description: A massive quadruped with a long spiky tail and a head reminiscent of a centipede's, with massive mandibles protruding from its face. It behaves much like a bull and appears to have seismic powers, allowing it to control the earth within its chamber.
Fallingstar Beast.description_cn: 坠星兽，从天而降的星之野兽，以重力为武器。

Fell Twins.name: Fell Twins
Fell Twins.description: Two bulky ogre-like creatures fighting side by side with red-hot armament
Fell Twins.description_cn: 凶兆双子，下水道中的恶兆双胞胎。

Fia's Champions.name: Fia's Champions
Fia's Champions.description: Five invaders summoned in an endurance combat in three waves.
Fia's Champions.description_cn: 菲雅的英雄们，被死王子召唤而来的各路英雄灵体。

Flying Dragon Agheel.name: Flying Dragon Agheel
Flying Dragon Agheel.description: A feared-by-most massive dragon located within the Dragon-Burnt Ruins in Limgrave
Flying Dragon Agheel.description_cn: 飞龙亚基尔，盘旋于宁姆格福沼泽的火焰飞龙。

Fire Giant.name: Fire Giant
Fire Giant.description: Upon realizing the flames of their forge would never die, Queen Marika, marked him with a curse. "O trifling giant, mayest thou tend thy, flame for eternity.
Fire Giant.description_cn: 火焰巨人，守护巨人山顶火焰大锅的远古巨人。

Flying Dragon Greyll.name: Flying Dragon Greyll
Flying Dragon Greyll.description: A large grey dragon, Flying Dragon Greyll patrols the bridge breathing fire and flying down on those trying to cross.
Flying Dragon Greyll.description_cn: 飞龙格利尔，龙墓大桥附近的巨大飞龙。

Frenzied Duelist.name: Frenzied Duelist
Frenzied Duelist.description: A humanoid with heavy armor and a massive axe.
Frenzied Duelist.description_cn: 癫火斗士，被癫火吞噬的疯狂战士。

God-devouring Serpent.name: God-devouring Serpent
God-devouring Serpent.description: A massive, menacing reptile that poses a remarkable threat.
God-devouring Serpent.description_cn: 噬神大蛇，火山官邸深处的大蛇，吞噬神明的异形。

Glintstone Dragon Smarag.name: Glintstone Dragon Smarag
Glintstone Dragon Smarag.description: A fearsome magic dragon with crystalized magic stone for scales. Jealously guards the entrance to the Academy's Crystal Cave.
Glintstone Dragon Smarag.description_cn: 辉石龙斯马拉格，在学院门前徘徊的辉石龙，守护着学院入口。

Glintstone Dragon Adula.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula
Glintstone Dragon Adula.description: A powerful and devastating dragon, a menace for all type of fighters.
Glintstone Dragon Adula.description_cn: 辉石龙亚杜拉，侍奉卡利亚王室的古龙。

Godefroy The Grafted.name: Godefroy The Grafted
Godefroy The Grafted.description: A member of Godrick the Grafted's family imprisoned by the Dragon Knight during the War of the Shattering.
Godefroy The Grafted.description_cn: "接肢"葛孚罗，与葛瑞克同源的另一只接肢贵族，被囚禁在封印监牢中。

Godfrey, First Elden Lord (hoarah Loux).name: Godfrey, First Elden Lord (hoarah Loux)
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (hoarah Loux).name_cn: 初始艾尔登之王葛孚雷（荷莱·露）
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (hoarah Loux).description: I've given thee courtesy enough. Now I fight as Hoarah Loux. Warrior!
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (hoarah Loux).description_cn: 初代艾尔登之王葛弗雷／战士荷莱·露，褪去王号后的真正姿态。

Godfrey, First Elden Lord (golden Shade).name: Godfrey, First Elden Lord (golden Shade)
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (golden Shade).name_cn: 初始艾尔登之王葛孚雷（黄金幻影）
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (golden Shade).description: Physical form of Godfrey, First Elden Lord
Godfrey, First Elden Lord (golden Shade).description_cn: 初代艾尔登之王葛弗雷（黄金幻影），守护王城的虚像。

Godrick The Grafted.name: Godrick The Grafted
Godrick The Grafted.description: Godrick the Grafted is the ruler of Stormveil Castle, wielding a large golden axe. He has grafted many arms on his body, a symbol of power to all those who might try to depose him.
Godrick The Grafted.description_cn: "接肢"葛瑞克，史东薇尔城的统治者，挥舞巨大金斧，身上接合了众多肢体。

Godskin Apostle.name: Godskin Apostle
Godskin Apostle.description: The apostles, one said to serve Destined Death, are wielders of the god-slaying black flame. But after their defeat by Maliketh, the Black Blade, the source of their power was sealed away.
Godskin Apostle.description_cn: 神皮使徒，侍奉「黑焰」的使徒之一，拥有延展的身体。

Godskin Apostle And Godskin Noble.name: Godskin Apostle And Godskin Noble
Godskin Apostle And Godskin Noble.location: Spiritcaller Cave, Mountaintops of the Giants
Godskin Apostle And Godskin Noble.description: They are found in their spirit forms, spawned by the opportunist Spirit-Caller Snail.
Godskin Apostle And Godskin Noble.description_cn: 神皮使徒与神皮贵族，双重黑焰的致命组合。

Death Rite Bird.name: Death Rite Bird
Death Rite Bird.description: Immense bird skeleton with crow-like features. Rushes to battle from above while wielding a giant spear.
Death Rite Bird.description_cn: 死亡仪式鸟，在死之迷路中徘徊的幽火之鸟，散布死亡之雾。

Godskin Noble.name: Godskin Noble
Godskin Noble.description: The most aggresive of the Godskin.
Godskin Noble.description_cn: 神皮贵族，身体臃肿却动作敏捷，使用刺锤与黑焰。

Grafted Scion.name: Grafted Scion
Grafted Scion.description: An amorphous blob that wields two swords and a shield, and appears to be grafted with multiple arms.
Grafted Scion.description_cn: 接肢贵族，初始受难之敌，持有双刀或盾矛。

Great Wyrm Theodorix.name: Great Wyrm Theodorix
Great Wyrm Theodorix.location: North of Albinauric Rise in Mountaintops of the Giants
Great Wyrm Theodorix.description: A dragon wyrm with immense power.
Great Wyrm Theodorix.description_cn: 大土龙席欧多利克斯，与熔岩土龙同源的巨型龙种。
Great Wyrm Theodorix.location_cn: 白面具塔北方（巨人山顶）

Hoarah Loux, Warrior.name: Hoarah Loux, Warrior
Hoarah Loux, Warrior.description_cn: "战士"荷莱·露，褪去艾尔登之王身份后的纯粹战士姿态。

Kindred Of Rot.name: Kindred Of Rot
Kindred Of Rot.description: Large, prawn-like creatures skilled at melee combat. Its Pest's Glaive poses a menace when wielded by these agile beings.
Kindred Of Rot.description_cn: 腐败眷属，侍奉猩红腐败的虫型生物。

Guardian Golem.name: Guardian Golem
Guardian Golem.description: The Guardian Golem, magical constructs that has been cut and chiseled from stone. It is the sole guardian of the Highroad Cave who holds a precious item.
Guardian Golem.description_cn: 守护者魔像，古代工匠制作的机关巨人。

Godskin Duo.name: Godskin Duo
Godskin Duo.description: A complementing pair of creatures extremely well versed in dual-battling. These beings achieve an exceptionally balance in combat, resulting in a devastating synergy.
Godskin Duo.description_cn: 神皮双人组，使徒与贵族联手作战。
Godskin Duo.location_cn: 逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉

Leonine Misbegotten.name: Leonine Misbegotten
Leonine Misbegotten.description: Aggressive and feral, the Misbegotten sees nothing but rage
Leonine Misbegotten.description_cn: 狮子混种，半狮半人的混种战士，在摩恩城顶端挥舞大刀。

Lichdragon Fortissax.name: Lichdragon Fortissax
Lichdragon Fortissax.description: Massive four winged black dragon with the ability to wield lightning.
Lichdragon Fortissax.description_cn: 死龙弗尔桑克斯，被死亡卢恩侵蚀的古龙，守护死王子的沉睡。

Mad Pumpkin Head.name: Mad Pumpkin Head
Mad Pumpkin Head.location: Waypoint Ruins, Limgrave, Caelem Ruins, Caelid
Mad Pumpkin Head.description: A huge ogre-looking creature that has a large pumpkin helmet worn on its head. It wields a massive flail and seems to be guarding something or someone against intruders.
Mad Pumpkin Head.description_cn: 发狂南瓜头，戴着巨大南瓜头盔的狂战士。
Mad Pumpkin Head.location_cn: 驿站街遗迹、盖尔坑道废墟

Magma Wyrm.name: Magma Wyrm
Magma Wyrm.description: A large lesser dragon with bronze-colored scales covering its body. Magma Wyrms inhabit deep cave systems and volcanos, thriving within lava-flooded environments.
Magma Wyrm.description_cn: 熔岩土龙，被龙飨诅咒侵蚀而成的熔岩巨兽。

Lion Guardian.name: Lion Guardian
Lion Guardian.description: The Lion Guardian of Stormveil has been coerced into service by cruel means
Lion Guardian.description_cn: 狮子守护者，镇守神兽塔的巨大狮像，暴怒而迅猛。

Malenia, Blade Of Miquella.name: Malenia, Blade Of Miquella
Malenia, Blade Of Miquella.name_cn: 米凯拉的锋刃玛莲妮亚
Malenia, Blade Of Miquella.description: ...Heed my words. I am Malenia. Blade of Miquella. And I have never known defeat.
Malenia, Blade Of Miquella.description_cn: "米凯拉的锋刃"玛莲妮亚，从未败北的女武神。
drops: 玛莲妮亚的大卢恩（使用后）

Maliketh, The Black Blade.name: Maliketh, The Black Blade
Maliketh, The Black Blade.description: O, Death. Become my blade once more.
Maliketh, The Black Blade.description_cn: "黑剑"玛利喀斯，死亡卢恩的持有者，兽爪与黑剑的化身。
Maliketh, The Black Blade.location_cn: 逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉

Miranda The Blighted Bloom.name: Miranda The Blighted Bloom
Miranda The Blighted Bloom.location: Weeping Peninsula: Tombsward Cave, Altus Plains: Perfumer's Grotto
Miranda The Blighted Bloom.description: A giant poison flower that is deadlier than it looks.
Miranda The Blighted Bloom.description_cn: 腐败开花米兰达，巨大的米兰达花变异体。
Miranda The Blighted Bloom.location_cn: 啜泣半岛归树洞窟、亚坛平原调香师洞窟

Mimic Tear.name: Mimic Tear
Mimic Tear.description: An eccentric being capable of taking a comprehensive shape of its adversary, ranging from body features to armament.
Mimic Tear.description_cn: 仿身泪滴，完美复制挑战者的姿态与能力。

Misbegotten Crusader.name: Misbegotten Crusader
Misbegotten Crusader.location: Cave of the Forlorn in Mountaintops of the Giants
Misbegotten Crusader.description_cn: 混种圣骑士，手持圣树大剑的混种精英。

Mohg, Lord Of Blood.name: Mohg, Lord Of Blood
Mohg, Lord Of Blood.description: Welcome, honored guest. To the birthplace of our Dynasty!
Mohg, Lord Of Blood.description_cn: 鲜血君王蒙格，蒙格温王朝的主人，操纵诅咒之血。

Mohg, The Omen.name: Mohg, The Omen
Mohg, The Omen.description_cn: 恶兆蒙格，下水道深处的恶兆之子。

Magma Wyrm Makar.name: Magma Wyrm Makar
Magma Wyrm Makar.description: Aggressive Fire Wyrm guarding the entrance to Altus Plains from any who attempt to bypass the lift
Magma Wyrm Makar.description_cn: 熔岩土龙马卡尔，古遗迹断崖深处的熔岩巨兽。

Necromancer Garris.name: Necromancer Garris
Necromancer Garris.description: A humanoid necromancer draped in a red cloth. Efficient in the death sorceries.
Necromancer Garris.description_cn: 死灵法师加里斯，操纵骷髅的邪恶术士。

Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest.name: Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest
Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest.name_cn: 诺克斯剑士与诺克斯祭司
Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest.description: A duo of warriors comprised of the female Swordstress, who uses a sword with a whip-like function to attack at medium range and a male Priest who uses spells from afar.
Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest.description_cn: 诺克斯剑士与诺克斯祭司，永恒之城的双人组合。

Night's Cavalry.name: Night's Cavalry
Night's Cavalry.description: Imposing knight figure atop a dark steed, wielding a large flail or halberd.
Night's Cavalry.description_cn: 黑夜骑兵，在夜间大道上巡逻的冷傲骑士。

Omenkiller.name: Omenkiller
Omenkiller.location: Village of the Albinaurics, Volcano Manor, Perfumer's Grotto
Omenkiller.description: An omninous figure wielding two serrated swords.
Omenkiller.description_cn: 恶兆猎人，专门猎杀恶兆之子的猎手。
Omenkiller.location_cn: 白金村、火山官邸、调香师洞窟

Onyx Lord.name: Onyx Lord
Onyx Lord.description: The Onyx Lords, who had skin of stone, were called lords in reverential fear of their destructive power.
Onyx Lord.description_cn: 黑王，操纵重力术的星之遗民。
Onyx Lord.location_cn: 封印坑道、王室封印监牢

Perfumer Tricia.name: Perfumer Tricia
Perfumer Tricia.description: A long range spellcaster complemented by an armored, short-distance warrior.
Perfumer Tricia.description_cn: 调香师特里西娅，使用治愈香气的友好调香师。

Putrid Grave Warden Duelist.name: Putrid Grave Warden Duelist
Putrid Grave Warden Duelist.description: Grave Wardens protect the secrets of the ancients, but the corruption of the land has affected them too
Putrid Grave Warden Duelist.description_cn: 腐败墓地守卫斗士，被腐蚀侵蚀的古老斗士。

Pumpkin Head.name: Pumpkin Head
Pumpkin Head.description: The breaking disrupted the flora and fauna of the region. Some took a rather intense liking to the larger plants that emerged
Pumpkin Head.description_cn: 南瓜头士兵，戴着厚重南瓜头盔的精英士兵。

Putrid Tree Spirit.name: Putrid Tree Spirit
Putrid Tree Spirit.description: A blood-rotted tree that has found life despite the death that consumes it.
Putrid Tree Spirit.description_cn: 腐败树灵，被猩红腐败扭曲的树灵。

Radagon Of The Golden Order.name: Radagon Of The Golden Order
Radagon Of The Golden Order.description: Lord Radagon was a great champion, possessed of flowing red locks. He came to these lands at the head of a great golden host, when he met Lady Rennala in battle. He soon repented his territorial transgressions though, and became husband to the Carian Queen. However. When Godfrey, first Elden Lord, was hounded from the Lands Between, Radagon left Rennala to return to the Erdtree Capital, becoming Queen Marika's second husband and King Consort. Taking the title... of second Elden Lord.
Radagon Of The Golden Order.description_cn: 黄金律法拉达冈，艾尔登之王的另一半，持有艾尔登之兽的力量。

Red Wolf Of Radagon.name: Red Wolf Of Radagon
Red Wolf Of Radagon.location: Raya Lucaria Academy, Liurnia of the Lakes
Red Wolf Of Radagon.description: Fierce guardian and protector of its master, even when it has long left.
Red Wolf Of Radagon.description_cn: 拉达冈的红狼，雷亚卢卡利亚学院图书馆的守卫。

Red Wolf Of The Champion.name: Red Wolf Of The Champion
Red Wolf Of The Champion.description: A ferocious red wolf with large fangs and blistering speed.
Red Wolf Of The Champion.description_cn: 勇士的红狼，更为凶悍的变种。

Regal Ancestor Spirit.name: Regal Ancestor Spirit
Regal Ancestor Spirit.description: A spirit glowing in pale blue light, suspended in the air and taking the shape of a huge deer.
Regal Ancestor Spirit.description_cn: 祖灵之王，幽光森林中的王者灵体。

Royal Knight Loretta.name: Royal Knight Loretta
Royal Knight Loretta.description: The eternal guardian of Caria Manor fervently defends her domain atop the Royal Moongazing Grounds. Loretta uses her greatbow to rain destruction on all who would dare approach the estate grounds.
Royal Knight Loretta.description_cn: 卡利亚骑士罗蕾塔，卡利亚城寨上层的守卫者。

Royal Revenant.name: Royal Revenant
Royal Revenant.location: Kingsrealm Ruins, Liurnia of the Lakes
Royal Revenant.description: An obscene and disturbing abomination, blend of a spider-like creature and human limbs resulting in a quite resourceful fighter at close range.
Royal Revenant.description_cn: 王室幽魂，无数手臂的扭曲怪物，来自冥界的复仇者。

Runebear.name: Runebear
Runebear.description: Ferocious, robust creature that's huge in size and remarkably agressive.
Runebear.description_cn: 符文熊，力大无穷的巨型灰熊。

Rykard, Lord Of Blasphemy.name: Rykard, Lord Of Blasphemy
Rykard, Lord Of Blasphemy.description: Join the Serpent King, as family... Together, we will devour the very gods!
Rykard, Lord Of Blasphemy.description_cn: 亵渎君王拉卡德，与大蛇融为一体的火山官邸主人。
drops: 拉卡德的大卢恩（使用后）

Scaly Misbegotten.name: Scaly Misbegotten
Scaly Misbegotten.description: A troll like scavenger with an insatiable taste for blood.
Scaly Misbegotten.description_cn: 鳞片混种，半人半龙血脉的混种战士。

Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-knowing.name: Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-knowing
Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-knowing.description: Sir Gideon Ofnir, now far from the books and immersed in battle.
Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-knowing.description_cn: 全知者基甸·奥夫尼尔，圆桌厅堂的领主，知晓一切秘密的学者。

Soldier Of Godrick.name: Soldier Of Godrick
Soldier Of Godrick.description: An esteemed high rank soldier, who wields a massive sword and wears his armor proudly.
Soldier Of Godrick.description_cn: 「葛瑞克的士兵」，精英士兵，手持巨剑身穿重甲。

Spirit-caller Snail.name: Spirit-caller Snail
Spirit-caller Snail.description_cn: 唤灵蜗牛，躲在暗处召唤灵体的神秘生物。
Spirit-caller Snail.location_cn: 道路尽头地下墓地、唤灵洞窟

Starscourge Radahn.name: Starscourge Radahn
Starscourge Radahn.description: General Radahn is cursed ever to wander. Eaten from the inside, by Malenia's scarlet rot, his Wits are long gone. Now he gathers the corpses of former friends and foes alike, gorging on them, like a dog.
Starscourge Radahn.description_cn: "碎星"拉塔恩，拉达冈与蕾娜菈之子，手持巨剑屹立于盖利德战场。

Tibia Mariner.name: Tibia Mariner
Tibia Mariner.location: Summonwater Village, Liurnia of The Lakes, Wyndham Ruins
Tibia Mariner.description: Tibia Mariner is a spectral sailor capable of calling forth the aid of undead Skeleton creatures and is mainly found at northeast Summonwater Village in Limgrave, near the limits with Caelir. This is an optional boss as players must not defeat it in order to advance to the Legacy Dungeon.
Tibia Mariner.description_cn: 船之骷髅，驾驶幽灵船的死亡摆渡人。

Ulcerated Tree Spirit.name: Ulcerated Tree Spirit
Ulcerated Tree Spirit.description: A corrupted and deformed tree that lurks in Mt. Gelmir.
Ulcerated Tree Spirit.description_cn: 腐败树灵，被侵蚀扭曲的黄金树根化身。

Valiant Gargoyle.name: Valiant Gargoyle
Valiant Gargoyle.description: Just like the wielder, the missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions.
Valiant Gargoyle.description_cn: 英勇石像鬼，守护深根底层的双持石像鬼。

Wormface.name: Wormface
Wormface.description: A ghastly blood rotted tree with the face of a hundred worms.
Wormface.description_cn: 蠕脸怪，长满蛆虫面孔的扭曲怪物。

Tree Sentinel.name: Tree Sentinel
Tree Sentinel.description: The heavily armored and highly decorated sentinel protects the tree. Who would dare oppose him?
Tree Sentinel.description_cn: 树哨兵，守护黄金树大道的重装骑士。
